description: Hard-break v2 refactor with explicit plan/apply contracts, quantified quality gates, and bounded org execution.

tasks.title: Define v2 invariants and ADR baseline
tasks.description: Document non-negotiable sync invariants, architecture boundaries, and break policy from v1. Acceptance: invariants include determinism, idempotency, conflict-first behavior, and destructive-op visibility; ADRs include no-shim migration stance and break matrix.

tasks.title: Model operation algebra and core data types
tasks.description: Define planner and executor contracts in discriminated-union data types. Acceptance: specs/types.ts defines SyncPlan, PlanOp, Conflict, and ApplyResult plus tri-state description intent with no ambiguous null/undefined states.

tasks.title: Build deterministic planner engine
tasks.description: Implement buildPlan that computes immutable operation plans from config plus repository state. Acceptance: identical inputs produce byte-stable operation ordering and identical inputHash; planner performs zero direct mutations.

tasks.title: Add preflight conflict detection
tasks.description: Detect duplicate targets, case-collisions, alias cycles, and alias-target conflicts before execution. Acceptance: planner emits exact conflict codes `duplicate-target`, `case-collision`, `alias-cycle`, and `alias-target-collision` before any API call.

tasks.title: Build idempotent executor engine
tasks.description: Implement applyPlan with bounded retries and per-operation outcomes. Acceptance: reapplying a successful plan yields zero net mutations on second run; executor only accepts preflight-clean plans.

tasks.title: Define typed error taxonomy
tasks.description: Replace generic failures with typed errors across planner and executor. Acceptance: auth, permission, conflict, transport, and validation failures map to stable codes and remediation messages prefixed with `Try:`.

tasks.title: Redesign CLI around plan and apply
tasks.description: Replace monolithic sync entrypoint with plan, apply, validate, and doctor commands. Acceptance: doctor emits checks `token-present`, `labels-read-access`, `labels-write-capability`, `config-valid`, `plan-buildable` with `required/status/failureCode`; defaults are `mode=plan`, `writeProbe=auto`, `probeLabelPrefix=__glm_probe__`, `probeTimeoutMs=5000`; mode matrix is enforced (`plan` optional write check, `apply` required write check); write probe splits `401->auth` and `403->permission`, handles `422` retry only for name-collision, retries cleanup delete twice, and exits `0` only when all required checks pass.

tasks.title: Reset library API to planner and executor
tasks.description: Expose buildPlan and applyPlan as core public API and retire legacy sync-first exports. Acceptance: public contracts align with CLI plan/apply flow and preserve typed error/result surfaces.

tasks.title: Add structured report outputs
tasks.description: Provide machine-readable and human-readable run reports (json, markdown, annotations) from a shared result model. Acceptance: json and markdown outputs always have identical summary counts and operation totals.

tasks.title: Expand reliability tests and CI gates
tasks.description: Add integration, e2e, contract, and perf coverage and enforce quality gates in CI. Acceptance: line coverage >= 90%, branch coverage >= 80%, npm artifact smoke test, action smoke test, and plan/apply regression suites are blocking.

tasks.title: Rewrite docs from executable examples
tasks.description: Rewrite README, JSR, and NPM docs to match v2 APIs and command behavior exactly, including a v1-to-v2 break matrix. Acceptance: every documented example compiles or runs in CI and no stale API names remain.

tasks.title: Implement org-scale multi-repo runner
tasks.description: Add repo fan-out execution with bounded concurrency and per-repo isolation. Acceptance: MVP supports explicit repo list only, concurrency range 1..16 (default 4), partial failures never abort unrelated repos, and task starts only after D10 and D11 are complete.
